title: Guidance Veterans Of The Lgbt Ban Financ

sections.heading: Summary
sections.content:
Guidance: Veterans of the LGBT Ban: Financial Recognition Scheme. Guidance on the LGBT Financial Recognition Scheme for veterans who served under, and were impacted by, the Ban on LGBT personnel in HM Armed Forces from 1967 to 2000.

Guidance: Veterans of the LGBT Ban: Qualification of administrative discharge and restoration of rank. Guidance on the qualification of administrative discharge and restoration of rank for veterans who were administratively discharged and/or reduced in rank under the Ban, between 1967 and 2000.

Transparency data: Military Court Service sentencing remarks 2025. Transcripts of sentencing remarks from Service Court hearings in the Court Martial from 2025.

sections.heading: Context
sections.content: Transport and infrastructure decisions shape how passengers and freight reach Scottish and UK airports. For historical context on aviation infrastructure and industrial development, see the linked research volumes.
